mapper.select: SELECT order_no AS orderNo, order_content AS orderContent, order_point AS orderPoint, amount AS amount, order_state AS orderState, order_date AS orderDate, student_id AS studentId, stock_no AS stockNo FROM ORDERS WHERE order_no = ( SELECT order_no FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = #{content} AND order_point = #{orderPrice} AND amount = #{orderAmount} AND student_id != #{studentId} ORDER BY order_date ASC LIMIT 1 ) FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS ( order_content, order_point, amount, order_state, order_date, student_id, stock_no ) VALUES ( #{content}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{state}, NOW(), #{studentId}, #{stockNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_point AS orderPoint, amount AS amount, order_content AS orderContent FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND order_state = 'PENDING' ORDER BY order_date ASC

SELECT order_point AS orderPoint, amount AS amount, order_content AS orderContent FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = 'SELL' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT order_point AS orderPoint, amount AS amount, order_content AS orderContent FROM ORDERS WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND order_state = 'PENDING' AND order_content = 'BUY' ORDER BY order_date ASC
